headline: ₹0-10 Cr at risk — Singularity AMC's investment in Lohia Aerospace Systems signals board-level governance focus, minimal direct business impact
what_matters: No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is negligible.
Triggers BRSR, GRI, DJSI, ESRS, CFA ESG, COSO ERM frameworks, but only at a disclosure level; no penalties or deadlines.
No material impact on cost of capital or fund flows.
